tools.description: Lists, validates, and dispatches repo tools.

Validates organizer discovery categories, candidate batches, seed links, and dedupe keys.

Normalizes organizer discovery run logs into source evidence records for future Firestore import.

Applies an approved host discovery Firestore import plan with explicit project, overwrite, and prod guardrails.
Validates private organizer entities, multi-surface identity, dedupe keys, manual review queues, and public projection guardrails.
Creates a reviewed copy of the generated organizer pending-decision answer packet with reviewer/date metadata, leaving decisions null for manual review.
Validates and renders the read-only answer packet for pending organizer publication and product policy decisions.
Validates a completed organizer pending-decision answer packet and renders local decision draft commands without executing them.
Validates a filled pending-decision answer packet, runs every local decision draft dry-run, and writes repo-backed decision JSON only when --write is passed.
Scans reviewed organizer answer-packet drafts and reports whether any are source-fresh, complete, and ready for the guarded apply step.
Validates and renders the read-only organizer promotion execution packet linking reviewed approvals to website generation and claim-target sync gates.
Lists organizer intake policy gaps and drafts reviewed accept, hold, or reject decisions without enabling crawls, provider lookups, or event imports.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/policy_gap_decision.mjs draft recurring_event_crawl_policy --decision hold --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --note "Need budget decision." --dry-run

tools.description: Validates and prints the read-only organizer operational health rollup without requiring pending admin or policy work to be complete.
Validates and renders the read-only organizer admin/product pending-input request generated from publication packets, policy packets, and workflow health.
Validates that every unresolved organizer operational-health workstream is represented by a pending input request or workflow follow-up.
Normalizes external organizer surface URLs into schema-shaped platform surfaces with stable dedupe keys and disabled-by-default crawl metadata.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/normalize_surface_url.mjs https://luma.com/pxgmph3b --surface-id sample-luma-surface --expect-platform luma --expect-kind eventListing --expect-key luma:event:pxgmph3b

tools.description: Converts captured provider search results for a host-discovery run key into a private organizer search-result batch without live crawling or Firestore writes.
Normalizes captured organizer search-result batches into admin-reviewable surface candidates matched against existing organizer dedupe keys.
Converts reviewed Luma event JSON/JSON-LD payloads into private external event source batches without live crawling or Firestore writes.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/capture_luma_events.mjs --entity afterfly --surface afterfly-luma-takeoff-run-rave --raw-results tool/organizer_intake/fixtures/luma_event.afterfly.raw.json --date 2026-06-17 --city-slug indore --country-code IN --source-url https://luma.com/pxgmph3b --output tool/organizer_intake/fixtures/luma_event.afterfly.expected.json --check

tools.description: Normalizes reviewed external event source batches into blocked-by-policy event candidates for admin review and future import planning.
Builds a no-provider-call location resolution queue for external event candidates missing exact coordinates before import planning.
Lists external event location tasks and drafts reviewed exact-coordinate resolution files without calling providers, importing events, or writing Firestore.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/event_location_resolution.mjs draft 2026-06-17-afterfly-luma-events:pxgmph3b --queue tool/organizer_intake/fixtures/external_event_location_resolution_queue.expected.json --name "Nehru Stadium" --address "Nehru Stadium, Indore, Madhya Pradesh" --place-id ChIJ-afterfly-indore --latitude 22.7196 --longitude 75.8577 --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --note "Manual location QA complete." --confirm-location-checklist --dry-run

tools.description: Builds a no-network crawl run intent plan for crawl-capable organizer surfaces without fetching providers, scheduling jobs, or writing Firestore.
Builds a no-upload raw artifact storage manifest that keeps raw provider payloads out of Firestore and blocks object storage until retention policy is approved.
Builds a disabled-by-default import plan from reviewed external event candidates into proposed event write actions without mutating Firestore.
Generates source-mention LLM adjudication prompt payloads without calling a model.
Validates proposed external event imports against the createEvent callable payload contract without invoking the callable or writing Firestore.
Publishes generated external event import-plan and preflight snapshots to eventSupplyReadiness/current for the live Events admin tab; dry-run by default and does not write externalEvents/{id}.
Lists external event candidates and drafts manual QA approve, hold, or reject decision files without importing events.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/event_review_decision.mjs draft 2026-06-17-afterfly-luma-events:pxgmph3b --queue tool/organizer_intake/fixtures/external_event_candidates.expected.json --decision approve_for_import --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --note "Reviewed for future import." --confirm-import-checklist --dry-run

tools.description: Lists organizer intake review items and drafts manual QA approve, hold, or suppress decision files.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/review_decision.mjs draft afterfly --decision approve_public --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --note "Reviewed for public projection." --confirm-publication-checklist --confirm-manual-reports-reviewed --dry-run

tools.description: Lists and drafts organizer intake curation operations for merges, suppressions, surface decisions, and split-required surfaces.
checks: node tool/organizer_intake/curation_decision.mjs draft attach_surface --entity afterfly --search-candidate 2026-06-17-afterfly-search-fixture:sort-my-scene --search-queue tool/organizer_intake/fixtures/search_result_candidates.expected.json --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --reason "Surface belongs to this organizer." --dry-run

node tool/organizer_intake/curation_decision.mjs draft surface_decision --entity afterfly --surface afterfly-wrong-website-reported --decision reject_wrong_entity --reviewer codex-dry-run --date 2026-06-17 --reason "Wrong entity." --dry-run
